name: Marble and Wood Accent Table - Threshold™: Natural Finish, Round Shape, Adjustable Feet, 20.2" Height
description:
Add classic flair to your home with this Marble and Wood Accent Table from Threshold™. This round wide-leg accent table is crafted from wood to make it a beautiful and practical addition to any space in your home. Designed with a marble tabletop, this wood-grain-finish accent table integrates well with your existing decor style.

Threshold™: Looks like home, feels like you.
